title: ON VEHICLE SERVICE — Vehicle Speed Sensor

figures_detected.description: Illustration showing the vehicle speed sensor (output shaft speed sensor) location on the A/T unit, with the sensor callout label pointing to the component.

content_blocks.text: ON VEHICLE SERVICE — Vehicle Speed Sensor

steps.text: Remove the vehicle speed sensor (output shaft speed sensor) from the A/T.
notes: Always replace the O-ring with a new one. Do not reuse.

content_blocks.text: Always replace the O-ring with a new one. Do not reuse.

model_notes: Procedure applies to A/T (automatic transmission) equipped vehicles.
